chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT MIPURKHAS C.P No.S-173 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 10.09.2025 Mr. Wishan Das Kolhi, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Shahnawaz Jinjh, Advocate along with respondents No.7 to 10 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh along with ASI Muhammad Juman PS Dilbar Khan Mahar Through this petition, the petitioner is essentially seeking protection and defense against harassment caused by the police officials at the instance of private respondents. Learned counsel for the private respondents states that the private respondents have not harassed the petitioner and undertake that they shall refrain from doing so in future. Learned Law Officer appearing for the official respondents submits that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall extend protection to the petitioner, as and when required. In view of the above statements, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and to provide protection to the petitioner, as and when needed. JUDGE Ali Haider
